Angiopoietin-2 (Ang-2) critical regulators tumor angiogenesis. Human mouse Ang-2 share amino acid identity Ang-2 approximately identical Ang-1. Ang-2 contains N-terminal coiled-coil domain C-terminal fibrinogen-like domain. Located N-terminus stretches hydrophobic residues typical secretory signal sequences. Although likely playing different functional roles, both Ang-1 Ang-2 ligands endothelial cell receptor tyrosine kinase Tie-2. regulation Tie-2 activity Ang-2 complex, leading inhibition certain cell types conditions, activation others. vitro studies demonstrated that Ang-1, Ang-2, could stimulate Tie-2 tyrosine phosphorylation suggested that Ang-2 could competitive inhibitor Ang-1 signaling. Consistent with role Ang-1/Tie-2 inhibitor, transgenic overexpression Ang-2 leads disruption embryonic blood vessel formation, phenotype similar that Tie-2 knockouts. contrast, altering incubation times elevating Ang-2 concentrations, under some circumstances, result Tie-2 activation HUVECs. also been proposed that Ang-2 play pro-angiogenic role mediating destabilizing interactions between endothelial perivascular cells, enhancing effects pro-angiogenic proteins including vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF). Alone, Ang-2 promotes endothelial cell death vessel regression, synergy with VEGF promote vessel formation. Ang-2 been implicated cancer development role angiogenesis. Ang-2-mediated destabilization mature vessel structures accompanied presence VEGF, contribute angiogenesis associated with tumor tissues. Several studies have examined Ang-2 expression assortment human cancers. Ang-2 elevated colon carcinoma, gastric carcinoma, glioblastoma, glioma, hepatocellular carcinoma, neuroblastoma non-small cell lung cancer. Lippy founder editor Esopus magazine executive director Esopus Foundation. also curator, having exhibitions White Columns, York. Lippy been interviewed publications, such Becoming Graphic Designer: Guide Careers Design. Sponsored Curatorial Practice, Graphic Design, Graphic Design Post-Baccalaureate Program, Graphic Design Department, Mixed Media Lecture Series.
Chip Wass attended School Institute University Iowa before moving 1989. illustrated award-winning work variety editorial advertising clients, designed dingbat typeface Chippies Wassco, directed various animation projects. Mascot Prep, short Disney, nominated Best Short International Animated Film Society. represented Gotham Group. Clients include Cartoon Network, Nickelodeon, MTV, Target, Nike, York Times, ESPN, Penguin Books, Wall Street Journal many others. served York board American Institute Graphic Arts. lecture sponsored Illustration Practice.
SEIDEL Director Student Experience Business Innovation Factory author "Hip Genius: Remixing High School Education." Previously, worked with leading national education organizations, including Black Alliance Educational Options, Picture Learning, Jobs Future, well spectrum other clients diverse projects, ranging from redesigning statewide juvenile justice system working with Rockefeller family repeal Rockefeller Drug Laws. taught variety settings from first grade community college. speaks internationally about innovative solutions challenges facing schools, community organizations, prisons. passionate experienced leader education transformation. Sponsored Social Design.
Taylor Fischer (Illustration) received undergraduate degree four years ago, been working gaming industry much longer. Currently Firaxis Games, also worked Zenimax Online Studios, LLC, Huge Games concept artist. expertise includes Photoshop, Illustrator, Fork Particle Effects, Zbrush. Sponsored Illustration Practice.
